result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make it so that every being—human or otherwise—could truly understand and experience the feelings and perspectives of others. Not just intellectually or out of politeness, but with genuine empathy so deep that cruelty and apathy would be fundamentally alien. I think such a shift would re-shape almost everything: how people treat each other, how we care for the planet, and how we move through conflict and cooperation. Maybe not a perfect world, but one with a profound sense of connectedness at its core.
